name: Human-centered approaches in geovisualization design: Investigating multiple methods through a long-term case study

milestones.name: Conduct Contextual Inquiry with Domain Specialists
Analyze Domain Tasks, Data, and Work Practices
Engage Domain Experts via Sketching and Card Sorting
Incorporate Expert Feedback on Tools and Interactions
Develop Wireframe Prototypes with Realistic Data Context
Iterate Early Designs through Think-Aloud Sessions
Refine Concepts via Autoethnographic Design Reflection
Construct Paper and Digital Interactive Prototypes
Enable Exploratory Interaction with Real Domain Data
Iterate Designs Based on Specialist Feedback and Use
Integrate Features into Coherent Geovis Application Design
Support Flexible Exploration with Combined Visual Tools
Evaluate Prototypes via Active Intervention Sessions
Assess Exploration and Insight through Free Interaction
